# PuInput

## Intent

- text input
- single-line field
- search input

## Prefer When

- Use for single-line text or numeric input with package styling and events.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for multi-line text; use PuTextarea.

## Import

```ts
import { PuInput } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
